fato_historico: 2014: TransAsia Airways Flight 222 crashes in Xixi village near Huxi, Penghu, during approach to Penghu Airport. Forty-eight of the 58 people on board are killed and five more people on the ground are injured.
energia_do_dia: Today may invite a deep reflection on the fragility of existence, much like the gentle winds that stir the wings of a four-leaf clover. Consider how precious each connection truly is. It is a good time to embrace the warmth of your community and let gratitude guide your path toward more meaningful, lasting horizons.
frase_do_dia: Cherish the light within you, for it illuminates the path for everyone around.
significado_numero: A symbol of remembrance, honoring the beauty of every passing moment.
conselho: Reach out to a friend and share a moment of sincere kindness today.
